title: xanthium orientale subsp. californicum
intro: Xanthium orientale subsp. californicum, also known as the California cocklebur, is a subspecies of the Xanthium orientale plant, a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant effects, making it useful for relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Xanthium orientale subsp. californicum include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe coughs, and promote digestion, among others. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to support respiratory health and alleviate various ailments.
